items.title: South Korea appeals court gives seven-year jail term to former President Yoon in arrest obstruction case

items.title: Tropical forest loss eases after record year: researchers
items.summary: The world lost 4.3 million hectares (10.6 million acres) of tropical primary rainforest last year — down 36% from 2024, said researchers from the World Resources Institute (WRI) and the University of Maryland
